notes: Sua loi voice preview/MP3 bao 'spawn ffmpeg ENOENT', an cua so cmd flash len khi chay ffmpeg ngam, thu gon scene picker o Edit video thanh 1 hang vuot ngang, AI Auto Edit giao dien gon hon, click vao chip 'Co loi' de xem chi tiet loi, dung luong server/may chuyen vao trang Tai khoan va goi (bam vao ten de xem).
